content: We can structure a Hybrid Planning and Learning System around the progressive curriculum framework of Three-Stage Progressive Reinforcement Learning, where each stage tunes the balance between model-based planning and trial-and-error learning while allocating curiosity-driven intrinsic reward to prioritize memory updates for high-uncertainty state-action chunks. This staged adaptation of the hybrid learning-planning tradeoff automatically grows the agent's active memory capacity aligned with the complexity of the task it is mastering.
